title: Account Management Tenant
description: Account Management tenant resource type. Pins the structural contract (field shapes, length bounds, formats) for a tenant instance so AM-side validation does not duplicate the bounds at every call site. The tenant lifecycle / hierarchy semantics (status enum, parent_id chain, soft-delete) live in the AM module's domain model and are not part of this base schema.

parent_id.description: Parent tenant id; null for the platform root.

tenant_type.description: Chained GTS schema identifier of the registered tenant type (e.g. `gts.cf.core.am.tenant_type.v1~cf.core.am.customer.v1~`). Resolved at read time via the Types Registry; absent from the projection when the registry lookup fails (transport blip) or no registry is wired (dev/test deployments) — see `TenantContext::tenant_type` for the same fallback semantics on the IdP-plugin boundary. The trailing `~` is the GTS terminator and is part of the identifier.
